## Relevance to the Burgess Principle

## Checklist

- [ ] I have discussed this change in an Issue or Discussion first (or it is a small fix).
- [ ] My changes are **focused** — they address one concern and do not bundle unrelated features, demos, or prototypes.
- [ ] I have **not** introduced application code unrelated to the Burgess Principle (e.g., e-commerce demos, payment integrations, unrelated full-stack apps).
- [ ] I have reviewed my changes for security issues (no XSS, injection, hardcoded secrets, or price/input-manipulation vulnerabilities).
- [ ] My changes maintain the calm, respectful, non-confrontational tone of the project.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where applicable.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where applicable.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] New template or case study
- [ ] Toolkit or enforcement enhancement
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other (describe below)
